translation.DeleteAllConfirmDescribe: Are you sure to delete all projects?
translation.DeleteConfirmDescribe: Are you sure to delete the selected projects?
translation.DeleteProjectConfirmDescribe: Are you sure to delete this project?
translation.DeleteItemConfirmDescribe: Are you sure to delete this item?
translation.FileSearchDescribe: Enter the file path and press enter to search
translation.FileNotFundDescribe: File not found, check the file path
translation.FileConflictContent: The imported file conflicts with the original file of the project. Continuing to import will overwrite the original file
translation.FileUnsafeContent: The imported file is not a safe route and cannot be imported.
translation.LargeFileContent: The file is too large, and there may be cases of slow loading or OOM (out of memory). If you continue, please click 'confirm'.
translation.PathLengthExceededContent: Path length exceeds the maximum limit allowed by the operating system, which may cause parsing to fail. Please check the file name or file depth. To ignore and continue parsing, please click 'confirm'.
translation.Duplicate Project: Project name already exists, modification of project name failed
translation.Set Comparison Data Out Of Range: Set Comparison Data Out Of Range!
translation.Baseline Conflict: Can't set baseline and comparison data to be the same
translation.PathNotFound: The file at path '{{path}}' was not found
